42a3a8e9-d12c-4740-8b1d-df2cf5ac5b3b.title: Athletics starting pitcher loses no hitter in 7th inning against Yankees
42a3a8e9-d12c-4740-8b1d-df2cf5ac5b3b.summary: It was shaping up to be a historic afternoon in the Bronx—until one swing changed everything. Jeffrey Springs, starting for the Athletics, carried a no-hitter into the 7th inning against the New York Yankees, only to see it slip away…
